title: Edit ConversationRefs.tsx to fix errors and improve type safety
job:
Edit plugins/dev-department/src/ui/components/ConversationRefs.tsx to fix errors.

Read the existing file first. Make these changes:

1. In the RefRow component, rename the prop from ref to conversationRef (ref is reserved in React)
2. Remove the local type re-declarations for ConversationSystem and ConversationRole — import them from ../../worker/types instead
3. Change scopeType prop type from string to ScopeType (import from ../../worker/types)
4. Change the hardcoded id='auth-add' on the checkbox to use a dynamic id: id={auth-add-scopeId}
5. Add URL validation in handleAdd: reject URLs that dont start with https:// or http://

Commit.
